attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 TVOUTPUT.BATCH_ID
,TVOUTPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID              
,CAST(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT AS DATE) as START_TV_DT
,TVOUTPUT.NODE_TYPE                   
,COALESCE(MAX(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT -  INTERVAL '1'  DAY) 
				OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID
				ORDER	BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT  ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 	FOLLOWING 	AND	1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_TV_DT 
,TVOUTPUT.RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID    
,TVOUTPUT.CREATE_DTM CRAETE_DATETIME	
,TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE AS ACTION_CODE
,ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID
		ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC) 
	AS RANK_INDEX
,(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NIHNT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'U'  ELSE 'I'  END ) AS DML_TYPE
FROM
 (
 SELECT 
  TVINPUT.BATCH_ID                        
 ,TVINPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID           
 ,TVINPUT.NODE_TYPE      
 ,TVINPUT.RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID    
 ,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT
 ,TVINPUT.CREATE_DTM  
 ,TVINPUT.ACTION_CODE                     
 ,ROW_NUMBER () OVER(PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID,TVINPUT.NODE_TYPE , TVINPUT.RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID ,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT 
					ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DTM DESC) AS ROW_NUM 
 FROM 
 ( 
	SELECT  
	  ASMP.BATCH_ID BATCH_ID
	, ASMP.REPORT_LEVEL_1 BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID  
	, CAST('ROOT' AS VARCHAR(20)) NODE_TYPE 
	, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(20)) RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID
	, MIN(CMONTH.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE) 	START_TV_DT
	--, ASMP.CREATE_TIMESTAMP CREATE_DTM
	,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CREATE_DTM
	, ASMP.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB ASMP
	INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_AE_OPEN_PERIOD SAOP
		ON ( SAOP.OPEN_FLAG='Y'  )
	INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  CMONTH
		ON (SAOP.FISCAL_MONTH_ID    =   CMONTH.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100+ CMONTH.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  )
	WHERE ASMP.REPORT_LEVEL_1 IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ASMP.BATCH_ID, BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID , CREATE_DTM , ASMP.ACTION_CODE
	UNION ALL
	SELECT
	  -999 BATCH_ID
	, BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID           
	, NODE_TYPE      
	, RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID 
	, START_TV_DT       
	, EDW_UPDATE_DTM CREATE_DTM                          
	, 'X' ACTION_CODE                         
	FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_TV 
	WHERE NODE_TYPE = 'ROOT'
	AND END_TV_DT = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) 
	AND (BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID) IN
		(SELECT REPORT_LEVEL_1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB	) 
  )TVINPUT
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT 
                      ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DTM DESC) = 1
 ) TVOUTPUT
LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_TV  NIHNT
ON ( TVOUTPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID = NIHNT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID
AND TVOUTPUT.NODE_TYPE = NIHNT.NODE_TYPE
AND  NIHNT.NODE_TYPE = 'ROOT' 
AND NIHNT.END_TV_DT = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) )
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1

SELECT
 TVOUTPUT.BATCH_ID
,TVOUTPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID              
,TVOUTPUT.NODE_TYPE                   
,TVOUTPUT.RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID    
,CAST(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT AS DATE) as START_TV_DT
,COALESCE(MAX(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT -  INTERVAL '1'  DAY) 
				OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID
				ORDER	BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT  ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 	FOLLOWING 	AND	1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_TV_DT 
,TVOUTPUT.CREATE_DTM CRAETE_DATETIME
,TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE AS ACTION_CODE 
,ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID
		ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC) 
	AS RANK_INDEX
,(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NIHNT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'U'  ELSE 'I'  END ) AS DML_TYPE
FROM
 (
 SELECT 
  TVINPUT.BATCH_ID                        
 ,TVINPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID           
 ,TVINPUT.NODE_TYPE      
 ,TVINPUT.RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID    
 ,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT
  ,TVINPUT.CREATE_DTM  
 ,TVINPUT.ACTION_CODE                     
  ,ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID,TVINPUT.NODE_TYPE , TVINPUT.RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID  ,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT 
					ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DTM DESC) AS ROW_NUM  
 FROM 
 ( 
	SELECT  
	  ASMP.BATCH_ID BATCH_ID
	,CASE WHEN ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME IN ('WARRANTY OPTICAL PROVISION','WARRANTY NON-OPTICAL PROVISION') THEN  
		ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME ELSE ASMP.REPORT_LEVEL_3 END AS BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID  
	, CAST('MIDDLE' AS VARCHAR(20)) NODE_TYPE 
	, ASMP.REPORT_LEVEL_2 RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID
	, MIN(CMONTH.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE) 	START_TV_DT
	--, ASMP.CREATE_TIMESTAMP CREATE_DTM
	,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CREATE_DTM
	, ASMP.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB ASMP
	INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_AE_OPEN_PERIOD SAOP
		ON ( SAOP.OPEN_FLAG='Y'  )
	INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  CMONTH
		ON (SAOP.FISCAL_MONTH_ID    =   CMONTH.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100+ CMONTH.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  )
     WHERE ASMP.REPORT_LEVEL_3 IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ASMP.BATCH_ID, BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID , RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID, CREATE_DTM ,  ASMP.ACTION_CODE
    UNION
	SELECT  
	  ASMP.BATCH_ID BATCH_ID
	, ASMP.REPORT_LEVEL_2 BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID  
	, CAST('MIDDLE' AS VARCHAR(20)) NODE_TYPE 
	, ASMP.REPORT_LEVEL_1 RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID
	, MIN(CMONTH.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE) 	START_TV_DT
	,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CREATE_DTM
	, ASMP.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB ASMP
	INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_AE_OPEN_PERIOD SAOP
		ON ( SAOP.OPEN_FLAG='Y'  )
	INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  CMONTH
		ON (SAOP.FISCAL_MONTH_ID    =   CMONTH.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100+ CMONTH.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  )
	WHERE ASMP.REPORT_LEVEL_2 IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY  ASMP.BATCH_ID, BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID , RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID, CREATE_DTM ,  ASMP.ACTION_CODE
	UNION ALL
	SELECT
	  -999 BATCH_ID
	, BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID           
	, NODE_TYPE      
	, RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID 
	, START_TV_DT       
	, EDW_UPDATE_DTM CREATE_DTM                          
	, 'X' ACTION_CODE                         
	FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_TV 
	WHERE NODE_TYPE = 'MIDDLE'
	AND END_TV_DT = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) 
	AND (BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID) IN
		(SELECT CASE WHEN SUB_MEASURE_NAME IN ('WARRANTY OPTICAL PROVISION','WARRANTY NON-OPTICAL PROVISION') THEN  
		SUB_MEASURE_NAME ELSE REPORT_LEVEL_3 END AS REPORT_LEVEL_3 FROM $$STGDB.ST_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB
		UNION
		SELECT REPORT_LEVEL_2 FROM $$STGDB.ST_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB) 
  )TVINPUT
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT 
                      ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DTM DESC) = 1
 ) TVOUTPUT
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_TV  NIHNT
ON ( TVOUTPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID = NIHNT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID
AND TVOUTPUT.NODE_TYPE = NIHNT.NODE_TYPE
AND NIHNT.NODE_TYPE = 'MIDDLE' 
AND NIHNT.END_TV_DT = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) )
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1

SELECT
 TVOUTPUT.BATCH_ID
,TVOUTPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID              
,TVOUTPUT.NODE_TYPE                   
,TVOUTPUT.RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID    
,CAST(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT AS DATE) as START_TV_DT
,COALESCE(MAX(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT -  INTERVAL '1'  DAY) 
				OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID
				ORDER	BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT  ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 	FOLLOWING 	AND	1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_TV_DT 
,TVOUTPUT.CREATE_DTM CRAETE_DATETIME
,TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE AS ACTION_CODE
,ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID   
		ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC) 
	AS RANK_INDEX
,(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NIHNT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'U'  ELSE 'I'  END ) AS DML_TYPE
FROM
 (
 SELECT 
  TVINPUT.BATCH_ID                        
 ,TVINPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID           
 ,TVINPUT.NODE_TYPE      
 ,TVINPUT.RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID    
 ,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT
 ,TVINPUT.CREATE_DTM  
 ,TVINPUT.ACTION_CODE,                     
  ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID,TVINPUT.NODE_TYPE , TVINPUT.RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID  ,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT 
					ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DTM DESC) AS ROW_NUM 
 FROM 
 ( 
	SELECT  
	  ASMP.BATCH_ID BATCH_ID
	, ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID  
	, CAST('LEAF' AS VARCHAR(20)) NODE_TYPE 
	,CASE WHEN ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME IN ('WARRANTY OPTICAL PROVISION','WARRANTY NON-OPTICAL PROVISION') THEN ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME
	 ELSE	ASMP.REPORT_LEVEL_3 END AS RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID
	, CMONTH.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 	START_TV_DT
	--, ASMP.CREATE_TIMESTAMP CREATE_DTM
	,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CREATE_DTM
	, ASMP.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB ASMP
	INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_AE_OPEN_PERIOD SAOP
		ON ( SAOP.OPEN_FLAG='Y'  )
	INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  CMONTH
		ON (SAOP.FISCAL_MONTH_ID    =   CMONTH.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100+ CMONTH.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  )
	UNION ALL
	SELECT
	  -999 BATCH_ID
	, BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID           
	, NODE_TYPE      
	, RU_PARENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID 
	, START_TV_DT       
	, EDW_UPDATE_DTM CREATE_DTM                          
	, 'X' ACTION_CODE                         
	FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_TV 
	WHERE NODE_TYPE = 'LEAF'
	AND END_TV_DT = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) 
	AND (BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID) IN
		(SELECT SUB_MEASURE_NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB ) 
  )TVINPUT
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT 
                      ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DTM DESC) = 1
 ) TVOUTPUT
LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_TV  NIHNT
ON ( TVOUTPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID = NIHNT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID
AND TVOUTPUT.NODE_TYPE = NIHNT.NODE_TYPE
AND NIHNT.NODE_TYPE = 'LEAF' 
AND NIHNT.END_TV_DT = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) )
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1
